body.title: Rewrite /fixit = /decided + /sprint-batch (bug-path shortcut)
body.result: /fixit rewritten as /decided + /sprint-batch composition. Synced to ~/.claude/skills/fixit/, lab/claudecode/cc_skills/fixit/, ClaudeAndAkien/skills/fixit.md. Inherits /sprint-batch multi-ticket handling; /review still runs per draft w/ HIGH-inertia inline approval. e8f96273 + 3bbc7aa.
body.description:
After /decided and /sprint-batch ship, /fixit becomes a thin composition — implicit design (just-discussed), /decided on that scope, /sprint-batch on the just-filed tickets.

## Positioning
/fixit stays the fast reactive path for bugs and quick fixes. /decided handles the real design loop. Clear separation of intent.

## Blocked by
- T-decided-skill
- T-sprint-batch-skill

## Not in scope
- Changing what bug-fix sprints look like — just the routing.
